textByHashes.6292a28e49ee2f63bf1bdfc718e35fe584a503be: I am afraid not outerlander. Goodbye.
textByHashes.642ab798ca4a851bbc9ddd6078fa7bd081050230: I cannot speak to you outerlander! Talk to Brundt, the Chieftain!
textByHashes.434477ddce2f1fdd7b937f95b17e288e0c0220a1: You stay away from me outerlander!
textByHashes.50dbab40dec156efa590287269ee422f2c2af477: Hello again brother . What need you of me this day? You can always rely on my assistance!
textByHashes.34716da1ba9c76b7a9be866b1aa8b0287f12e461: Hello again sister . What need you of me this day? You can always rely on my assistance!
textByHashes.d92a3f4d7880888f8eb005dc0f335acfcadbc712: My door is always open should you ever need my help .
textByHashes.4a050e4312ddd0c65809c753d23c22a42fc8deb3: ... It has been too long since last we met!
textByHashes.4f7b5f3daf704131a48d147e07c4209f32d2501d: Welcome back brother . It is always a pleasure to see you here!
textByHashes.c16ae5b9c9b6bff475c46794fd781f9395226c35: Welcome back sister . It is always a pleasure to see you here!
textByHashes.aae1cab00a8b486ff5d04cfdbe79c0be4ee852b3: My apologies brother ! I have not time to tarry here with you!
textByHashes.a7feb7f2335cd59f6fd92eef78d18adcccb68e30: My apologies sister ! I have not time to tarry here with you!
textByHashes.226f235c64667b63dafd3ed2566b036c3d1bc4b2: How are you ? I hope all fares well with you this day!
textByHashes.962cc6e9c1a5b2f9c630de230f3f09b05474dc32: All is well with me also!
textByHashes.e063db0a81ff9f70a2fc5c4f4c43172dede5cbfd: Always good to see you brother .
textByHashes.90014ff29f06300f55ff11ce67db1ce9bec9737f: Always good to see you sister .
textByHashes.0531dffe04126fbc16eeb03493a35fd49da5d339: How can you steal from me, ?
textByHashes.4bbe37f03bbad85b0906d96f16610015fd0e3894: Why would you try to steal from me, ?
